word: H5765 - עֲוַל - ʻăval - aw-val' - Deal unjustly

sections.paragraph:
Original: עול

Transliteration: ‛âval

Phonetic: aw-val'

BDB Definition:

  1. to act wrongfully or unjustly, deviate from
    1. (Piel) to act wrongfully

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1580

Part(s) of speech: Verb
